working_on: Phase 5 master plan session per ADR 0051: author engine/session/auto_target.json (executable contract for routine-mode dispatch) and engine/build_readiness/phase_5.md (rationale doc covering Tier 1/2/3 triage). The master plan session is the gate session for Phase 5 per ADR 0040.
